summary: Base W7 — prescribed ~19 mpw, polarized ~85% Z1. TWO athlete schedule calls this week. (1) Tue↔Wed swap (6/2): Hyp A pulled to Tue, threshold 3×8 @ T + MHR-retest finisher pushed to Wed — both DONE. (2) NEW Fri↔Sat rearrangement (6/5): Hyp B pulled Sat→Fri to run FRESH (no AM long run in front of it), the Fri easy run + strides CHUCKED, so Sat is now long-run-only (Adj #54). Mon + Tue + Wed done; Thu Z1 easy SKIPPED (break/rest day, no quality lost). Wed T-run: 3×8 @ T 7:56/7:53/7:44 (a hair quick of the 8:00 lock), cadence 180, work-rep avg HR 171/175/178, RPE 7 / RIR 2 → 8:00/mi confirmed legit threshold (Adj #26); ran quick at RPE 7 = soft signal T pace has room (watch next T). RUN-MHR RETEST: finisher drove session peak to 187 = 98% of the 191 rower max, reached fatigued at session end (Adj #53) — doesn't exceed 191 so zones unchanged, but a fatigued 187 suggests a fresh max clears 191 (true run MHR likely 195+); standalone 1500m all-out on a fresh day still owed (W8/W9, Adj #9). Default §2.A ordering resumes W8. FRESH-FRIDAY UPSHOT: lat 150 (#35), preacher 60 (#49), and the chest-supp row 85 re-test (#36) all land without long-run-AM fatigue — the exact conditions Adj #36 wanted. FLAGS: (1) Seated calf 335 stays held until an AM-clean Achilles read (Adj #40); calf-Fri + long-run-Sat loads the Achilles two days running, inverting the protective calf-Sat-then-rest-Sun spacing — report AM Achilles status. (2) Hill strides still owed — earliest debut W9 Mon (W8 deload, Adj #44). (3) Cable lat capped 17.5 (#37) and tri 55 (#50) are hold-until-clean. Shoe: Vomero for the Sat long (Achilles reactive, Adj #34). Accutane tendon risk persists (§11.E).

days.note: Logged — Z1 easy 35 min @ 10:36/mi, HR 157, cadence 166, treadmill, Vomero Plus; SI + Achilles clean (first non-reactive Achilles read since the flare). First work set only (strides/recovery omitted per athlete). Held under the prescribed 40 (mileage hold). Hill strides HELD — earliest debut now W9 Mon (W8 deload, Adj #44).

days.session: Hypertrophy A (lift, no run) — swapped from Wed
days.note: Logged — Incline BB 145 bump MISSED (145×5/4 RIR 0/0, 140×4 RIR 0 → repeat 145 next Wed, §5 miss #1, Adj #47); DB lat 25→30 clean, no 27.5 DB (Adj #48); preacher 55 hold cleared → bump 60 (Adj #49); cable crunch 65→70 clean → 75 (Adj #51); tri pushdown 55 hold persists, set 3 still failure (Adj #50); rear-delt 125 holding. Soleus wall-sit PERMANENTLY RETIRED (Adj #52).

days.session: Threshold 3×8 min @ T (90 s rec) + MHR retest finisher — run only, swapped from Tue
days.note: Logged — 3×8 @ T at 7:56 / 7:53 / 7:44 per mi (a hair quick of the 8:00 lock; reps 1-2 in band, rep 3 just under), cadence 180/180/179, power 252–257W, work-rep avg HR 171→175→178. RPE 7 / RIR 2 ('could do 2 more pretty easily') → 8:00/mi confirmed legit threshold (Adj #26); ran quick of 8:00 at RPE 7 = soft signal T pace may have room, watch next T. MHR retest: finisher 3 min @ 6:49/mi, 184 spm, 295W drove session peak to 187 = 98% of the 191 rower max, reached fatigued at session end ('could never get to it') = end-of-session fatigue cap (Adj #53). Doesn't exceed 191 so 191 stands and zones unchanged, but a fatigued 187 supports a fresh max >191 (true run MHR likely 195+); clean standalone 1500m all-out on a fresh day still owed (Adj #9). SI/Achilles not reported.

Skipped — break/rest day per athlete call. Recovery slot, no quality lost; trims aerobic volume only. Fits the W7 Achilles-settle / mileage-hold posture (Adj #34/#44). Fri strides + Sat long unchanged.

days.session: Hypertrophy B (pulled from Sat; run fresh, no AM long run)
days.note: Hyp B moved Sat→today and run FRESH; the Fri easy run + strides CHUCKED (Adj #54). Bumps land without long-run-AM fatigue: lat → 150 (Adj #35), chest-supp row 85 re-test under fresh conditions (Adj #36), cable lat capped 17.5 (Adj #37), tri 55 hold-until-clean (Adj #50), preacher → 60 (Adj #49), seated calf 325 controlled — 335 HELD until Achilles AM-clean (Adj #40), hanging SLR add load/progress (Adj #41). Soleus retired (Adj #52). Calf-today + long-run-tomorrow loads the Achilles two days running — report AM Achilles status.

days.session: Long Z1 60 min AM (long-run-only — Hyp B pulled to Fri)
days.note: §4.C W7 Sat long (60 min prescribed; trim if Achilles reactive). Hyp B moved to Fri (Adj #54) so today is run-only — no PM lift. Vomero Plus for the long (Achilles reactive, Zoom Fly short tempo only, Adj #34). Anchor pace/RPE not the off-191 HR cap (Adj #9). Report AM Achilles status given Fri's seated calf.
Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily SI prehab. Walking fine. Achilles AM check if still reactive.
